# Packaging Factory Direct

> B2B custom packaging manufacturer. MOQ 500 PCS. OEM / ODM custom packaging for boxes, bags, pouches, labels, bottles, paper printing and premium packaging.

Contact: Linda Wang
Email: linda@colorprintingpackage.com
WhatsApp: +86 181 6573 0353
Address: Printing Industrial Park, Longhua District, Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, 518109, China
Site: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com

## Core buyer keywords

- Custom Gift Boxes
- Magnetic Packaging
- Rigid Boxes
- Mailer Boxes
- Paper Bags
- magnetic rigid box
- corrugated mailer box
- sliding drawer box
- cylinder tube packaging
- collapsible magnetic gift box
- paper gift bag
- foam insert
- food packaging box
- cardstock product boxes

- Custom Gift Boxes / Magnetic Packaging / Rigid Boxes / Mailer Boxes / Paper Bags guide: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/custom-gift-boxes-magnetic-rigid-mailer-paper-bags-guide.html
- Magnetic rigid box vs collapsible magnetic gift box: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/magnetic-rigid-box-collapsible-magnetic-gift-box-guide.html
- Corrugated mailer box vs cardstock product boxes: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/corrugated-mailer-box-cardstock-product-boxes-guide.html

- Sitemap: https://www.packagingfactorydirect.com/sitemap.xml

## ISR policy

The site uses append-only stable URLs and path-only ISR revalidation. Products, blog posts and news pages should be published as unique URLs and revalidated by exact path with /api/revalidate. Do not replace old URLs when publishing new packaging pages.

Last updated: 2026-07-04


## Incremental publishing policy

New product, blog and news URLs are append-only and stable. New product detail pages can be added through the external product manifest and refreshed by exact URL, so the whole catalog does not need to be reparsed. Existing product, blog and news URLs should not be renamed or overwritten.

## V72 deep SEO/GEO content pages

- Custom Gift Boxes RFQ Guide: Structure, Cost Drivers, Inserts and Premium Finishes: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/custom-gift-boxes-rfq-cost-structure-finish-guide.html

- B2B Packaging Dieline, Artwork and Prepress Checklist for Faster Sampling: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/b2b-packaging-dieline-artwork-prepress-checklist.html
- Custom Packaging Cost Drivers: MOQ 500 PCS, Materials, Tooling, Printing and Freight: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/custom-packaging-cost-drivers-moq-500-buyer-guide.html
- AI Search Changes B2B Packaging Procurement: What Buyers Expect from Supplier Pages: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/ai-search-b2b-packaging-procurement-2026.html
- Premium Gift Packaging Demand Moves Toward Custom Gift Boxes and Rigid Boxes: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/premium-gift-packaging-demand-custom-gift-boxes-rigid-boxes.html
- Ecommerce Brands Increase Demand for Corrugated Mailer Boxes with Better Protection: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/ecommerce-mailer-boxes-corrugated-protection-trend.html

- Food Packaging Box Buyers Focus on Grease Resistance, Food Contact and Custom Printing: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/food-packaging-box-buyers-focus-grease-resistance-food-grade.html

- Cardstock Product Boxes Demand Grows for Beauty, Electronics and Retail Goods: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/cardstock-product-boxes-retail-folding-carton-demand.html

## V72 precision ISR tags

products, product-slug, blog, blog-slug, news, news-slug, homepage, sitemap.


## V73 Hybrid B2B SSG + ISR + dynamic functions

This site follows a factory B2B architecture: static/ISR pages for SEO and GEO, plus dynamic search/RFQ/WhatsApp/email/R2/CMS functions for buyers. Important category and industry pages are crawlable stable HTML and are listed in sitemap.xml.

### Static category hubs
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-packaging-boxes.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-gift-boxes.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-magnetic-gift-boxes.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-stand-up-pouches.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-coffee-bags-with-valve.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-pharmaceutical-packaging-boxes.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-cosmetic-packaging-boxes.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-food-packaging.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-paper-bags.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/custom-labels-and-stickers.html

### Static industry solution pages
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/industry/cosmetic-packaging-solutions.html
- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/industry/food-and-restaurant-packaging-solutions.html

- https://packagingfactorydirect.com/industry/luxury-gift-packaging-solutions.html

## V74 Factory Visual Proof Gallery

Factory/company photos have been added to the About Us page and a dedicated blog/news entry:
- About Us visual proof: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/about.html#factory-visual-proof
- Blog gallery: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/blog/factory-production-showroom-qc-office-trade-show-gallery.html
- News update: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/news/factory-visual-proof-gallery-added.html
- Visual gallery data: https://packagingfactorydirect.com/data/company-visual-gallery.json

Images cover production workshop, flexible packaging line, label production, QC inspection, showroom, office, reception, trade show and export warehouse. Homepage and product page layout were not changed.
